description_long: This is a boxy, mid-sized SUV with a bright lime green exterior and a robust, utilitarian design reminiscent of off-road vehicles. The vehicle features a prominent spare tire mounted on the rear door, roof rails, and a set of side steps for easier entry. The windows are tinted and the body is accented with white trim on the mirrors, bumpers, and roof rails. The front grille is wide and rectangular, flanked by square headlights, and the hood has black vent detailing. The wheels are large with metallic, multi-spoke rims, and the overall stance is elevated, suggesting good ground clearance. The SUV appears to be designed for both urban and rugged environments, with practical features for versatility.
description: A lime green, boxy SUV with white trim, roof rails, side steps, and a rear-mounted spare tire. It has large metallic wheels and a robust, off-road-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the spare tire mounted on the back door, rear lights, and roof rails.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, side steps, tinted windows, and large wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, square headlights, hood vents, and white bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, side steps, and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke metallic rims with a slightly concave, robust design
